title: 麗しきストレス発散法？

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've been awfully busy lately. I know that's to be
expected, since I'm training an Umamusume
participating in the Twinkle Series, but even so...
choice_data_list: (I haven't even managed to tidy up...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's dust piling up in all four corners of my
room. I don't have the energy to clean it up right
now, though, so I head out to the academy.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You there! I apologize for the abrupt question,
but may I have a moment of your time?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You are Air Groove's trainer, are you not? I have
something rather important to discuss, and I need
someone I can trust.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I'll get straight to the point. Would cleaning your
residence be a worthwhile task?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I understand your confusion, but this is a matter
of extreme urgency. Please, answer me.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I'll ask you once more... Would cleaning your
residence be a worthwhile task?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Splendid! A good size—not too large, yet not too
small. Enough space to be satisfactory, but not so
much that it takes an unreasonable amount of
time.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
And most importantly, it belongs to someone
trustworthy! I couldn't possibly hope for a better
solution!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Will you give me five minutes? Just five minutes,
and I'll have Air Groove ready at your place.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure you've already gathered, but she'll be
cleaning your room! Wait for us there, please!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unsure of what's going on, I head back home and
wait as per Symboli Rudolf's request.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hello.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
The president gave me permission to clean your
room. I'd like to get started right away, if you
don't mind.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You can relax. This isn't charity. It's merely a
personal matter, first and foremost.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I'll get started then.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove pulls out a cloth and quietly begins
wiping down the surfaces in my room.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hm... The place is far dustier than it looks. But
not a speck shall escape me...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
This should go without saying, but I am counting
on you to keep today's events to yourself.
choice_data_list: Can you at least tell me what this is all about?
Can you at least tell me what this is all about?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Ah, yes, my apologies. Allow me to explain.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The student council has had to address a number
of difficult affairs recently—affairs that have been
causing us considerable mental strain.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: In other words, Air Groove has been extremely stressed as of late.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I approached you because I thought you could
provide a useful outlet for that stress.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Is that black mold I see on the window
frame? A simple cloth won't be enough to defeat
you... Hehehe... Ahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Oh no, there's no place for compassion on the
battlefield! Meet my secret weapon... baking
soda!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Air Groove seems to be enjoying herself. ...Maybe even a little too much.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I was also surprised when I first saw her like this. It
takes a lot for it to get this bad.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I stumbled upon her cleaning the floors of the
student council office one day. Every last speck
of dust—eradicated. It was quite the sight.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Cleaning is an act that has palpable results, so I
suppose it's easy to feel a sense of
accomplishment from it.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I questioned her about it afterward, but it
appears that she retains little memory of the
actual process.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Once again, I implore you not to tell anyone of
this. My esteemed right hand's good name is at
stake.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's all very well, but it feels weird to just stand
around and watch. Maybe I should...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Oh! A fine idea. Cleaning is a tiring business, after
all. Allow me to join you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The two of us head out to buy some snacks.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I feel much better now. Thank you, President.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
And thank you as well for allowing me this
opportunity, Trainer. By the way...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I didn't say anything... strange... while cleaning,
did I?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf shoots me a meaningful glance, so
I shake my head fervently.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Y-you wish to talk to her while she's in this state?!
Wh-what a novel idea! H-however, I...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Oh? You wish to enlist?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I like the cut of your jib! Very well, soldier. Take
the sodium bicarbonate solution!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: And you, President! Take that toothbrush!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: H-huh? I'm helping too?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Under the intense leadership of Air Groove, we
all have an enjoyable clean-up session... or so I'd
like to believe.
